title: International Response to Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship
subtitle: Global cooperation helps passengers return home safely after a deadly health crisis at sea.

summary.en: A serious hantavirus outbreak on the cruise ship MV Hondius has resulted in three deaths and multiple infections. The ship was forced to dock in Tenerife, where international health teams managed a complex operation to help passengers return home. Australian citizens were among those transported back under strict quarantine rules. Health experts emphasize that the risk to the general public remains very low. The response highlights the importance of global solidarity during public health emergencies.
summary.zh: 郵輪「宏迪斯號」爆發嚴重的漢他病毒疫情，造成 3 人死亡及多人感染。該船被迫停靠特內里費島，國際醫療團隊在那裡進行了一項複雜的行動，協助乘客返回各自的國家。澳洲公民在嚴格的隔離規定下被接回國。衛生專家強調，該病毒對一般大眾的風險仍然極低。此次應對行動凸顯了全球團結在公共衛生緊急事件中的重要性。

paragraphs.en: A dangerous health situation on the cruise ship MV Hondius has finally reached a conclusion after a major international effort. The ship, which was at the center of a hantavirus outbreak, recently completed its journey to the Netherlands. Hantavirus is a group of viruses usually spread to humans through contact with the waste of infected rodents. While human-to-human spread is very rare, it can happen through close and long-term contact, according to the Australian Centre for Disease Control.
paragraphs.zh: 在經歷了一場重大的國際救援行動後，郵輪「宏迪斯號 (MV Hondius)」上的危險健康危機終於告一段落。這艘爆發漢他病毒疫情的郵輪近期已抵達荷蘭。根據澳洲疾病管制中心指出，漢他病毒是一群通常透過接觸受感染齧齒動物排泄物而傳播給人類的病毒。雖然人傳人的情況非常罕見，但在密切且長期的接觸下仍有可能發生。

paragraphs.en: The outbreak on the ship resulted in 11 reported cases, with nine officially confirmed. Sadly, three people have died. Another passenger, a French woman, remains in critical condition with serious heart and lung problems. According to The Guardian Health, the Australian government worked quickly to bring its citizens home. Health Minister Mark Butler explained that the government had to find a special aircraft and crew willing to follow strict safety rules. These passengers were required to wear full personal protective equipment (PPE)—special clothing and masks to prevent infection—during their flight to Perth.
paragraphs.zh: 船上的疫情共造成 11 例通報病例，其中 9 例已正式確診。令人遺憾的是，已有 3 人不幸喪生。另一名法國籍女性乘客目前仍因嚴重的心肺問題處於危急狀態。根據《衛報健康版 (The Guardian Health)》報導，澳洲政府迅速採取行動將國民接回國。衛生部長巴特勒 (Mark Butler) 解釋，政府必須尋找願意遵守嚴格安全規範的特殊航空器與機組人員。這些乘客在飛往伯斯的航程中，必須全程穿戴個人防護裝備，即用以防止感染的特殊衣物與口罩。

paragraphs.en: Upon arrival in Australia, the passengers were moved to a national quarantine facility. Quarantine is a period of time where people must stay away from others to ensure they are not carrying a disease. The Australian government noted that these individuals will remain in isolation for at least three weeks. The flight crew involved in the mission will also undergo similar quarantine procedures. Minister Butler stated that the passengers were in good health and had tested negative for the virus before their departure.
paragraphs.zh: 抵達澳洲後，乘客被送往國家隔離設施。隔離是指人們必須與他人保持距離，以確保未攜帶疾病的一段時間。澳洲政府表示，這些人員將至少接受三週的隔離。參與此次任務的機組人員也將進行類似的隔離程序。巴特勒部長說明，乘客在出發前健康狀況良好，且病毒檢測結果皆為陰性。

paragraphs.en: While the situation was difficult, the World Health Organization (WHO) praised the response in Tenerife, where the ship first docked. WHO Director-General Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus noted that over 120 people from 23 countries were safely moved from the ship to their home nations. He thanked the Spanish government and the people of Tenerife for their kindness and professional coordination. He described the operation as a sign of moral courage, noting that the local community chose to help those in need rather than turning away out of fear.
paragraphs.zh: 儘管情況艱難，世界衛生組織 (WHO) 仍讚揚了郵輪首次停靠地特內里費島 (Tenerife) 的應對措施。世衛組織秘書長譚德塞 (Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus) 指出，來自 23 個國家的 120 多人已安全地從船上轉移回各自的國家。他感謝西班牙政府與特內里費島民眾的善意與專業協調。他形容這項行動展現了道德勇氣，並指出當地社區選擇幫助有需要的人，而非因恐懼而拒之門外。

paragraphs.en: Despite the severity of the outbreak on the ship, experts are working to calm public fears. Dr. Céline Gounder, an infectious disease doctor at KFF Health News, explained in several media interviews that the risk of hantavirus to the general public is "absolutely low." She noted that it is important for people to understand how the virus spreads, as it is very different from diseases like COVID-19. The WHO continues to maintain that the threat to the wider population is minimal.
paragraphs.zh: 儘管船上疫情嚴重，專家們仍致力於平息大眾的恐懼。凱撒家庭基金會健康新聞 (KFF Health News) 的傳染病醫師高德 (Céline Gounder) 在多次媒體採訪中解釋，漢他病毒對一般大眾的風險「絕對很低」。她指出，大眾了解病毒傳播方式非常重要，因為它與新冠肺炎 (COVID-19) 等疾病截然不同。世衛組織持續強調，該病毒對廣大民眾的威脅微乎其微。

paragraphs.en: As the MV Hondius arrived in the Netherlands, the ship’s operator announced that the vessel would undergo a thorough cleaning and disinfection process. The crew members remaining on board are also entering quarantine. The WHO Director-General offered his condolences to the families of those who died, as well as to the family of a local Spanish official who passed away from a heart attack while helping with the operation. He emphasized that behind every health report are real lives and real losses.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著宏迪斯號抵達荷蘭，船運營商宣布該船將進行徹底的清潔與消毒程序。船上剩餘的船員也已進入隔離狀態。世衛組織秘書長向罹難者家屬，以及在協助行動期間因心臟病發作而過世的一名當地西班牙官員家屬表達哀悼。他強調，每一份健康報告背後都是真實的生命與真實的損失。

paragraphs.en: The successful return of the passengers marks the end of a complex logistical challenge. The operation required cooperation between many different countries and organizations. As the passengers begin their quarantine, the focus now shifts to learning from this event to improve future responses to health crises. The global community has shown that through trust and shared responsibility, even the most difficult situations can be managed with care and safety.
paragraphs.zh: 乘客的成功返國標誌著這項複雜後勤挑戰的結束。這項行動需要許多不同國家與組織之間的合作。隨著乘客開始隔離，焦點現在轉向從此次事件中汲取經驗，以改善未來對健康危機的應對。全球社群已展現出透過信任與共同責任，即使是最困難的情況也能在謹慎與安全的前提下獲得妥善處理。

keyTerms.definitionEn: The most important or active part of a situation or event.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（中心點），這裡指事件的核心。文中：The ship, which was at the center of a hantavirus outbreak, recently completed its journey to the Netherlands.

keyTerms.definitionEn: Refusing to help someone or refusing to allow someone to enter a place.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 拒絕提供協助或拒絕讓某人進入。
keyTerms.noteZh: 這裡指拒絕幫助他人，而非字面上的轉身。文中：He described the operation as a sign of moral courage, noting that the local community chose to help those in need rather than turning away out of fear.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To change the focus or direction of something.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（輪班），這裡指注意力的轉移。文中：As the passengers begin their quarantine, the focus now shifts to learning from this event to improve future responses to health crises.

sources.name: The Guardian Health
sources.title: Australians from hantavirus cruise ship fly out of Netherlands in full PPE after plane and crew secured

sources.name: WHO News
sources.title: Follow-up message by the WHO Director-General to the people of Tenerife regarding the hantavirus response

sources.name: KFF Health News
sources.title: Hantavirus News Roundup: From Céline Gounder of KFF Health News

quiz.question: What specific safety requirement was mandated for the Australian passengers during their flight to Perth?

options.A: They had to remain in complete isolation from the flight crew.
options.B: They were required to wear full personal protective equipment.
options.C: They had to test negative for the virus immediately upon landing.
options.D: They were required to stay in a national quarantine facility on the plane.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案是 B。根據文章第二段，澳洲政府在安排撤僑時，明確要求乘客在飛往伯斯的航班上必須穿戴全套個人防護裝備（PPE）。選項 A 錯誤，因為隔離是在抵達後的檢疫設施進行；選項 C 錯誤，文中提到測試是在起飛前完成的；選項 D 則是混淆了抵達後的檢疫程序與飛行過程中的防護要求。

quiz.question: What can be inferred about the transmission of the hantavirus on the MV Hondius?

options.A: It was spread primarily through the air like COVID-19.
options.B: The majority of the passengers on the ship were infected.
options.C: The virus likely spread due to prolonged proximity between individuals.
options.D: The outbreak was caused by a failure in the ship's cleaning protocols.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案是 C。文章第一段指出漢他病毒通常透過接觸齧齒動物排泄物傳播，但人與人之間的傳播雖罕見，仍可能透過「密切且長期的接觸」發生。由於這是在郵輪這種封閉且長時間共處的環境中爆發，推論病毒是在船上透過人際接觸傳播是合理的。選項 A 與文章第五段提到的病毒特性矛盾；選項 B 誇大了感染人數（僅 11 例）；選項 D 文中並未提及清潔程序失敗是導致爆發的原因。

quiz.question: In the fourth paragraph, what does the word 'moral' imply in the phrase 'moral courage'?

options.A: Acting based on ethical principles rather than fear.
options.B: Following strict legal and professional guidelines.
options.C: Displaying physical bravery in a dangerous environment.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案是 A。文中提到特內里費島的民眾選擇幫助郵輪乘客，而非因恐懼而拒絕，這種行為展現了「道德勇氣」（moral courage）。這代表他們基於倫理與良知做出正確決定。選項 B 混淆了專業協調與道德選擇；選項 C 錯誤，因為這並非身體上的勇敢；選項 D 文中並未提及捐款，僅強調當地居民的接納與協助。

quiz.question: What is the primary message of the article regarding the MV Hondius incident?

options.A: The cruise industry needs to change its safety regulations immediately.
options.B: Hantavirus is a growing threat that requires global lockdowns.
options.C: The incident highlights the importance of international cooperation in managing health crises.
options.D: The Spanish government was solely responsible for the success of the rescue operation.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案是 C。整篇文章從郵輪爆發疫情、各國政府協助撤僑、WHO 的讚賞，到最後提到的總結，都在強調這是一場複雜的物流挑戰，需要多國與組織的共同合作才能成功。選項 A 並非文章重心；選項 B 與文中專家認為風險極低的說法相反；選項 D 錯誤，因為文中多次強調這是國際間的共同努力，而非單一國家的功勞。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
